summary: REQ-7 and REQ-8 appear implemented: all Valentine flow pages now have on-enter/card animations and the main "Yes" action routes to a new in-flow FinalYesPage with restart/back actions. REQ-9 (transparent PNG asset updates) cannot be confirmed from the provided diff summary because no image/binary asset changes are shown.

missing_requirements.requirement: Ensure all generated image assets used by the app have transparent backgrounds (alpha channel), including valentine-bg.dim_1920x1080.png, heart-mascot.dim_512x512.png, and mad-emoji.dim_256x256.png.
missing_requirements.reason: The diff summary only shows TypeScript/CSS/Tailwind changes and no evidence of updated PNG assets under frontend/public/assets/generated (or any image edits). Transparency/alpha-channel changes require modifying the actual image files, which are not reflected here.

hallucinated_features.description: Added an empty placeholder hook file (useQueries.ts) unrelated to the requested animation/final-page/transparent-image requirements.
hallucinated_features.reason: BuildRequest does not ask for adding new hooks or placeholder files; this appears extraneous to REQ-7/8/9.
